title: PackageAssignment
description: File-to-package mapping produced by the Planning Agent. Represents a diff against the existing partition.

runId.description: Unique run identifier linking to Manifest.json

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this artifact was produced

product.description: Product identifier scope for this assignment set

assignments.description: One entry per source or header file

filePath.description: Path relative to ClearCase view root

status.description: proposed=new suggestion from agent; accepted=human-approved; locked=immutable; conflict=multiple conflicting assignments

reason.description: Human-readable reason for any change from the existing assignment. Required when status is 'proposed'.

previousPackage.description: The package previously assigned in the copy-map. Null if this file was unassigned.

evidence.description: Sources of evidence supporting this assignment

conflictingPackages.description: Populated when status is 'conflict'; lists all packages claiming this file

forkable.description: If true, this file may legitimately appear in multiple packages

sourceRef.description: Reference to the specific build record file, include edge ID, or UserDecision ID

weight.description: Relative weight of this evidence in the assignment decision
